testcase.name: TC001 - Login to application
testcase.system-out: Given user is on OrangeHRM login page.......................................passed When user enter username....................................................passed When user enter password....................................................passed When user click on Login button.............................................passed Then the user is logged in to the application...............................passed Then the user is logged in to the application...............................passed

testcase.name: TC002 - Add Timesheet details
testcase.system-out: Given user is on OrangeHRM login page.......................................passed When user enter username....................................................passed When user enter password....................................................passed When user click on Login button.............................................passed Then the user is logged in to the application...............................passed Given user is on Dashboard page.............................................passed When user navigates to Time -> Timesheets...................................passed Then ViewEmployeeTimesheet page is displayed................................passed When User click on Timesheet option.........................................passed Then Timesheet dropdown list is displayed...................................passed When user select My Timesheets option from the Timesheet dropdown...........passed Then ViewMyTimesheet page is displayed......................................passed When User click on Edit button..............................................passed Then EditTimesheet page is displayed........................................passed When User click on Cancel button............................................passed Then My Timesheet page is displayed.........................................passed

testcase.name: TC003 - Add Contact details - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given user is on OrangeHRM login page.......................................passed When user enter username....................................................passed When user enter password....................................................passed When user click on Login button.............................................passed Then the user is logged in to the application...............................passed Given user is on dashbrd page...............................................passed When user click on My Info tab..............................................passed Then viewPersonalDetails page is displayed with all personal details of the user..passed When user click on Contact Details subtab...................................passed Then ContactDetails page is displayed.......................................passed When user enter steet1 "45 Street"..........................................passed When user enter city "New York City"........................................passed When user enter state "MH"..................................................passed When user enter zip code "67899"............................................passed When user enter country "Algeria"...........................................passed When user enter mobile "9876543210".........................................passed When user enter work phone "0123456789".....................................passed When user enter work email "test@xcmail.com"................................passed When user click on Save button..............................................passed Then Contact Details is saved successfully..................................passed

testcase.name: TC003 - Add Contact details - #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given user is on OrangeHRM login page.......................................passed When user enter username....................................................passed When user enter password....................................................passed When user click on Login button.............................................passed Then the user is logged in to the application...............................passed Given user is on dashbrd page...............................................passed When user click on My Info tab..............................................passed Then viewPersonalDetails page is displayed with all personal details of the user..passed When user click on Contact Details subtab...................................passed Then ContactDetails page is displayed.......................................passed When user enter steet1 "123 Street".........................................passed When user enter city "Los Angeles"..........................................passed When user enter state "CA"..................................................passed When user enter zip code "54321"............................................passed When user enter country "Angola"............................................passed When user enter mobile "7654320912".........................................passed When user enter work phone "11114455339"....................................passed When user enter work email "cc@ccmail.com"..................................passed When user click on Save button..............................................passed Then Contact Details is saved successfully..................................passed
